communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Washington Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All Advisories, Suspicious Activity Reports, Tips, Intelligence Briefs, Intel Reports, Leads Information or Data, Maps, Bulletins, BOLOs, and/or Joint Bulletins from January 1 2025 to the date this request is processed (inclusive) regarding threats from anti-technology extremists. Please use the following query terms, "anti-tech", "anti-technology" "Anti-AI" "data center protests" "targeting data centers" "Zizian". Please exclude news reports from your search. As a member of the news media writing in outlets including The American Prospect, The New Republic, and The Intercept I request media designation and that any fees associated with this request be waived.

Please see the following two articles for clear documentation of these threats:

https://thesoufancenter.org/intelbrief-2025-november-5/

https://www.thenationalnews.com/future/technology/2025/08/04/anti-tech-extremism-ai-violence/

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Daniel Boguslaw
